# Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 sentences. What problem does this PR solve?

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency or tooling update
- [ ] Breaking change

## Changes

- Describe the key implementation changes.
- Call out any behavior changes reviewers should verify.
- Note any tradeoffs or follow-up work if relevant.

## Public API Impact

- [ ] No public API changes
- [ ] Public API added
- [ ] Public API changed
- [ ] Public API removed

If there is any API impact, describe it here, including migration notes.

## Semver Impact

- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Minor
- [ ] Major

Explain the versioning impact if it is not obvious.

## Testing

- [ ] Existing tests cover this change
- [ ] New tests were added
- [ ] Tested manually

List the commands you ran and any important test cases:

```bash
# Example:
npm test
```

## Documentation

- [ ] No docs update needed
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Examples updated
- [ ] Inline docs or comments updated

If docs were not updated, explain why.

## Release Notes

If this should be called out in release notes, add a short entry here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated docs/examples for user-facing changes
- [ ] I documented any breaking changes or migration steps
